markdown:
#  What is a budget code structure in Procore's WBS? 
##  Background 
A _budget code structure_ is a sequence of [segments](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-segments-and-segment-items) used to build meaningful [budget codes](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) in accordance with the pattern established by your organization.
##  Answer 
In Procore's Work Breakdown Structure (WBS), the budget code structure is comprised of multiple segments. Each segment has a sequence of alphabetic and/or numeric characters and its own unique coding system. This coding system can be customized to suit the needs of your company and/or projects. When creating segments, it is also important to note that tiered segments are delimited by a dash (-) and segments are delimited by a period (.).
#### Default Budget Code Structure
In Procore, there are two (2) default segments in Procore's default budget code structure: cost code and cost type.
![Diagram Wbs Default Budget Code Structure](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/252a21065bbdd5f7dab2479fa8ca9c3f/42c69e0e35b3c2ec124edf3a72162a39/wbs-default-budget-code-structure.png?fm=webp)
#### Default Budget Code structure with Optional Sub Job Section
On Procore projects, you also have the option of enabling the sub jobs feature. See [Enable Sub Jobs for WBS](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/company-administration-work-breakdown-structure-guide/enable-sub-jobs-for-projects). If you choose to use this option, then there are three (3) default segments available in Procore's default budget code structure: sub job, cost code, and cost type.
![Diagram Wbs Default Budget Code Structure With Sub Job](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/59155a745be0b22be336660137f83d7b/ad0507524a6af62d5bba1a13f971ed78/wbs-default-budget-code-structure-w-sub-job.png?fm=webp)
#### Custom Budget Code Structure
You can also create a custom budget code structure. A custom structure must use Procore's two (2) default segments. Your Procore Administrator can also create a Company level budget code structure that includes up to ten (10) additional custom segments -- for a maximum of twelve (12) segments at the Company level. The example below shows you a four (4) segment budget code structure.
![Diagram Wbs Custom Budget Code Structure](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eb4a19ff453e9abbff3b5688fbf3d21b/ec5bc740ca9539b4eec8271074b9ab73/wbs-custom-budget-code-structure.png?fm=webp)
#### Arrange Your Budget Code Structure
No matter how many levels you choose for your company and projects, you can also arrange your segments to appears in any order that you want.
![Wbs Arrange Budget Code Structure](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1JNcvPWSbZXMRjxmXAyyEu/d3daac3623f010a48ee6467865903551/wbs-arrange-budget-code-structure.png?fm=webp)
## See Also

  * [What is the difference between a flat and tiered segment in Procore's WBS?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-a-flat-and-tiered-segment-in-procores-wbs)
  * [What are Procore's default cost codes?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-procores-default-cost-codes)
title: What is a budget code structure in Procore's WBS?
description: To provide a definition of the budget code structure in Procore's Work Breakdown Structure (WBS).
